workshop.title: Building Interactive Chat Interfaces with MCP-UI
workshop.summary: A hands-on workshop for building interactive React components inside conversational interfaces with MCP-UI.
workshop.description: Chat interfaces are everywhere, but they're still stuck with text-only interactions. In this hands-on full-day workshop, you'll learn how to build real, interactive React components that live inside conversational interfaces using MCP-UI. You'll go from basics to building production-ready chat-embedded UIs, and leave with practical skills for building interfaces in the age of conversational software.
